name: Get All Sold Prospects for a Division

content.query:
SELECT
prd.LongDescription as Product
,dsp.Disposition
,brn.LongName as Market
,cst.[CustomerID]
,[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[City]
,[State]
,[Zip]
,[Phone]
,[Email]
,lds.GrossSalesAmount
,lds.EntryDate
FROM 
[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
,[EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
,[EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
where cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
and lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
and lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
and lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
and dsp.Disposition = 'Sale'
and lds.Division = 'MAC'
--and prd.LongDescription = 'Windows/Doors'
